_meta.title: Klipper / Moonraker — print_stats.state → normalized lifecycle
_meta.family: any Moonraker host (Voron / RatRig / Sovol + vendor Klipper forks)

derived_from.source_note: Enum transcribed from Klipper source (klippy/extras/print_stats.py) via Moonraker's object model; ecosystem-corroborated (every Mainsail/Fluidd client speaks it), not first-party hardware-captured in this paper.

notes: Six documented values; map any other string to `unknown` rather than erroring.
State arrives via `printer.objects.subscribe`/`query` under object `print_stats`; deltas are sparse — deep-merge field-by-field, ordered by `eventtime`.
Do NOT confuse the lifecycle `print_stats.state` with `idle_timeout.state` (Idle/Printing/Ready) or `pause_resume.is_paused` — separate objects.
Normalized vocabulary here: standby | printing | paused | complete | cancelled | error | unknown.
